source_refs.title: Incorrect totals when line items use different tax rates
source_refs.excerpt: Mixed VAT and GST line items should round at the line level before invoice total aggregation.

expected_behavior.description: Invoice totals use line-level rounded tax amounts when line items have mixed tax rates.
Existing single-rate invoice totals remain unchanged.

out_of_scope_behavior.description: This change does not claim to alter currency conversion, discount allocation, or invoice rendering.
